value: v1.11.0 RELEASED 2026-04-08. Tracked via GitHub milestone v1.11.0 (https://github.com/seabearDEV/codexCLI/milestone/1). All four scoped items shipped: (1) Tier 1 doc fixes from PR #58 review, merged in 3077055; (2) withFileLock fail-closed in production with CODEX_DISABLE_LOCKING=1 opt-out for tests + lockless-fallback test coverage + defensive shallow-cache audit (#61, PR #66 merged 2026-04-08, commit 5b41b4b); (3) Short-flag namespace audit + --raw removal (#62, PR #65 merged 2026-04-08, commit 1c73e49) — removed --raw/-r entirely, added -p to --plain on get/context, added -j to stats --json, moved stats/audit --detailed from -d to -D; (4) CODEX_DATA_DIR polish (#63, PR #64 merged 2026-04-08, commit 74c1508) — README env-var section, absolute-path validation, ccli info provenance annotation, clearDataDirectoryCache() export, W_OK|X_OK writability check (Copilot review fix). Bonus quality-pass: telemetry consistency (PR #67 merged 2026-04-08, commit 830b7ee) — unified session ID between audit and telemetry via shared src/utils/session.ts, accurate CLI responseSize via stdout monkey-patch + responseMeasure state machine, withPager paged-output counting via Copilot review fix in commit 6059426. Plus release-prep cleanup (cc350d3): CHANGELOG section dedup, ⚠️ Breaking Changes callout, hide legacy -a flags on get/rename/remove, setConfigSetting regression test, docs/release-checklist.md added. Final test count: 1167 / 1167. Out of scope (deferred to v1.12+): hand-edit drift detection, --values long-flag clash on get vs find, full cross-command short-flag aesthetic cleanup. Next: v1.12.0 perf+observability mini-release per project.v112 — #57 #41 #68.
